title: cyathea glabra
intro: Cyathea glabra, also known as the Smooth Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Guinea, characterized by its smooth trunk and fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyathea glabra include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in salves and creams to apply topically to affected areas.
